title: Finance Executive (AR)
description:
📍 Location: Thomson 
💰 Salary: Up to $3,800
🕒 Work Week: Monday - Friday (8am - 5.30pm / 8.30am - 6pm)

Our client is Singapore’s most prestigious and well-established golf and lifestyle community, they offer world-class facilities, a storied heritage, and a deep sense of camaraderie among their members creating a rewarding environment.


Job Scope:

  • Prepare and post month-end journals, ensuring timely and accurate financial closing within targeted deadlines.
  • Ensure completeness and accuracy of revenue recording and handle timely, correct billing of invoices for members and corporate clients.
  • Manage and follow up on collections, update receivables, perform GIRO processing (new, termination, and collection), and reconcile debtors’ ageing reports.
  • Handle member and client inquiries, issue statements of account, and ensure accuracy of billing on member accounts.
  • Generate accounts receivable reports, verify miscellaneous corporate billing invoices, and provide explanations for receivables and collections.
  • Assist with year-end audits and perform other related accounting or administrative duties as assigned.

Requirements:

  • 2–3 years of experience in Accounts Receivable with strong proficiency in MS Office and finance systems; experience with Oracle ERP (NetSuite) is an advantage.
  • Detail-oriented and meticulous, with excellent organizational and project management skills.
  • Strong interpersonal and communication abilities, with a positive, team-oriented attitude.
  • Adaptable and able to work effectively in a culturally diverse, multi-ethnic environment.

To apply, kindly click APPLY NOW to submit your latest CV.


We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.




SAAY

EA License No.: 25C2695

postedCompany.description:
At Search Avenue Pte Ltd, we believe recruitment is more than just filling positions — it’s about building futures. Founded by two passionate individuals with over 12 years of recruitment experience, Search Avenue was born out of a shared vision: to raise the standards of recruitment through integrity, innovation, and unwavering dedication to people.

We are deeply committed to understanding the evolving needs of both employers and candidates. Our approach combines advanced technology with a human touch, ensuring personalized, efficient, and meaningful hiring experiences. Whether it’s permanent placements, executive searches, or talent mapping, our mission remains the same — to connect top-tier talent with companies that value diversity, capability, and culture fit.

Driven by our founders’ belief in work-life harmony, we champion flexible career opportunities and inclusive workplaces. Our goal is to empower individuals to thrive in their careers while honoring their personal commitments — and to help businesses grow stronger through passionate, high-performing teams.

At Search Avenue, recruitment is our craft — and people are our purpose.
